question: Bagaimana cara mendefinisikan resource limits dan requests untuk container di dalam sebuah Deployment?

ground_truth.answer: Untuk mendefinisikan resource limits/requests, traversal graph melewati 4 hop: Deployment → DeploymentSpec → PodTemplateSpec → Container → ResourceRequirements. Field resources pada Container memiliki dua sub-field: limits (batas maksimum CPU/memory) dan requests (kebutuhan minimum yang dijamin oleh scheduler). Contoh: resources.limits.cpu: '500m', resources.requests.memory: '128Mi'.
context: DeploymentSpec: specification of the desired behavior of the Deployment
PodTemplateSpec: describes the data a pod should have when created
Container: a single application container that you want to run within a pod
ResourceRequirements: describes the compute resource requirements
